name: HWR_SRVY_MEETING_PREF
description: This table is to be used by meeting survey to determine whether a particular user has opted in or opted out.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Fusion profile id of the person being identified in this record

columns.Name: OPT_IN
columns.Comments: OPT_IN flag. This determines if this person has opted in for Meeting survey or not. 0 --> NOT opted In. ; 1 --> Opted In

columns.Name: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: MEETING_PREF_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
